chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-437 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of MA No.2346/2021. For hearing of main case. 24.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General Sindh. None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2021 and it was only fixed in Court on 07.04.2022 when notices were ordered to be issued against respondents and A.A.G. Sindh. Thereafter no serious efforts have been made to proceed with the petition. Under the circumstances, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
